Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Proveup Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:46:35 a.m. and concluding at 09:48:15 a.m.

Plaintiff Robert Lowe represented by William Gilg, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Yuen Lai not appearing.

Plaintiff has not been able to get figures for rent, nor file statement of damages.
Plaintiff's request for continuance is argued and DENIED.

Court has done research on issues pending in this matter.
Court determines that Plaintiff seeks to enforce 2007 judgment and alledges new causes of action.

Plaintiff shall enforce judgment issued in 2007.
Motion for default prove-up hearing is DENIED.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:36:38 a.m. and concluding at 09:56:52 a.m.

Plaintiff Robert Lowe represented by Wiliam Glig, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Yuen Lai not appearing.

Plaintiff's Counsel presents summary of case.
ROBERT LOWE is under direct examination and is examined by the Court.

The Court continues this matter to give Plaintiff time to file a Statement of damages and submit an amended proposed order.

Matter continued to April 12, 2023 at 9:00 am in Department 505.

(D505)
